mapper.sql: FROM board_item i JOIN member m ON i.reg_id = m.id WHERE i.bo_seq = #{boardId} AND (i.delete_yn IS NULL OR i.delete_yn != 'Y')

COALESCE( i.reg_user_postcode, CASE WHEN NULLIF(REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(m.postcode, ''), '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), '') IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN LENGTH(REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(m.postcode, ''), '[^0-9]', '', 'g')) >= 5 THEN CAST(SUBSTRING(REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(m.postcode, ''), '[^0-9]', '', 'g') FROM 1 FOR 5) AS INTEGER) ELSE CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(m.postcode, ''), '[^0-9]', '', 'g') AS INTEGER) END )

if.test: (regionCode != null and regionCode != '') or postcode != null

choose.when: AND (LOWER(i.title) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) OR LOWER(i.content) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')))

ORDER BY ( COALESCE(i.like_count, 0) * 3 + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_comment bc_pop WHERE bc_pop.bi_seq = i.bi_seq AND (bc_pop.delete_yn IS NULL OR bc_pop.delete_yn != 'Y')) * 2 + COALESCE(i.read_count, 0) ) DESC, i.reg_date DESC

mapper.select:
SELECT i.bi_seq, i.title, i.content, i.bi_category, i.location_scope, COALESCE(i.read_count, 0) AS read_count, COALESCE(i.like_count, 0) AS like_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_comment bc WHERE bc.bi_seq = i.bi_seq AND (bc.delete_yn IS NULL OR bc.delete_yn != 'Y')) AS comment_count, i.fix_yn, i.place_name, i.place_address, i.place_lat, i.place_lng, CASE WHEN COALESCE(i.urgent_resolved_yn, 'N') = 'Y' THEN true ELSE false END AS urgent_resolved, i.urgent_resolved_date, i.reg_id, m.name AS reg_user_name, COALESCE(i.reg_user_region_name, m.region_name) AS reg_user_region_name, m.parenting_stage AS reg_user_parenting_stage, m.is_honor_neighbor AS reg_user_honor_neighbor, i.reg_date, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM board_item_like bil WHERE bil.bi_seq = i.bi_seq AND bil.mb_id = #{memberId}::uuid ) THEN true ELSE false END AS liked, CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM board_file bf WHERE bf.bi_seq = i.bi_seq) THEN true ELSE false END AS has_file
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT c.bc_seq, c.bi_seq, c.parent_seq, c.depth, c.content, COALESCE(c.like_count, 0) AS like_count, c.secret_yn, c.fix_yn, c.delete_yn, c.reg_id, m.name AS reg_user_name, m.parenting_stage AS reg_user_parenting_stage, m.is_honor_neighbor AS reg_user_honor_neighbor, c.reg_date, c.update_id, c.update_date, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM board_comment_like bcl WHERE bcl.bc_seq = c.bc_seq AND bcl.mb_id = #{memberId}::uuid ) THEN true ELSE false END AS liked FROM board_comment c LEFT JOIN member m ON c.reg_id = m.id WHERE c.bi_seq = #{itemId} /* 삭제된 댓글도 항상 표시 */ /* AND ( (c.delete_yn IS NULL OR c.delete_yn != 'Y') OR ( c.parent_seq IS NULL AND c.delete_yn = 'Y' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM board_comment child WHERE child.parent_seq = c.bc_seq AND (child.delete_yn IS NULL OR child.delete_yn != 'Y') ) ) ) */ ORDER BY CASE WHEN c.fix_yn = 'Y' AND c.parent_seq IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, COALESCE(c.parent_seq, c.bc_seq), CASE WHEN c.parent_seq IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, c.reg_date ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_item i JOIN member m ON i.reg_id = m.id JOIN board b ON i.bo_seq = b.bo_seq WHERE b.bo_use_yn = 'Y' AND b.bo_read_auth = 'USER' AND (i.delete_yn IS NULL OR i.delete_yn != 'Y') /* 동네 게시판: postcode 일치하는 글만, 일반 게시판: 전체 */ AND ( COALESCE(b.bo_neighbor_yn, 'N') != 'Y'
OR () = #{postcode}
)
AND LOWER(i.title) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND LOWER(i.content) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND LOWER(m.name) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND (LOWER(i.title) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) OR LOWER(i.content) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')))
